title: Toxic Storm
description: Toxic Storm is a deadly survival mod that transforms Minecraft into a fight for your life against a massive toxic storm.
body:
🌪️ Toxic Storm – Survive the Poison
Toxic Storm is a deadly survival mod that transforms Minecraft into a fight for your life against a massive toxic storm. After three days in a new world, the storm awakens — and from that point on, survival becomes a desperate race against time, poison, and chaos.

⏳ You Have 3 Days
When you enter a new world, you have three in-game days to gather supplies, craft gear, and prepare. After that, the toxic storm begins — and only one place is safe: your original spawn point.

🛑 The Safe Zone
A small protected area around your spawn is the only place where the storm can't reach you.

Stepping outside it means instant death from the poisonous clouds.

Even hostile mobs like zombies and creepers spawn inside the safe zone, making it your only refuge and your greatest threat.

🧪 Toxic Resistance Potion
You’re not entirely helpless — using apples, you can craft a special potion that grants temporary immunity (2 minutes) to the toxic storm.
Use it wisely to explore, relocate, or escape when the storm shifts to another location.

💀 What Happens in the Storm?
☠️ Instant death outside the safe zone without protection

💣 Random TNT bombardments

🧟 Mob spawns inside the safe zone

⚡ Sudden teleportation events to random locations

🔧 Features
Global toxic storm starts after 3 days

Potion system that adds risk-reward choices

Perfect for chaos survival, hardcore maps, or content creators

⚠️ Early Development Notice
Toxic Storm is still under active development. Expect bugs and experimental mechanics. Feedback is welcome to help shape the final experience.
